fields.name: carrier_company
fields.label: Carrier Company
fields.description: Railway or carrier issuing the transport order (header block, e.g. ERS Railways GmbH)

fields.name: transport_company
fields.label: Transport Company
fields.description: Haulier / transport company receiving the order (e.g. Haller Transport GmbH)

fields.name: service_type
fields.label: Service Type
fields.description: Service description line (e.g. Leerumfuhr ex CDN)

fields.name: iso_type
fields.label: ISO Type
fields.description: ISO-Typ code from Ladeeinheit section (e.g. G1)

fields.name: tara_kg
fields.label: Tara (kg)
fields.description: Tara weight in kg from Ladeeinheit; convert European comma decimal if needed

fields.name: gross_kg
fields.label: Gross (kg)
fields.description: Brutto weight in kg from Ladeeinheit

fields.name: billing_reference
fields.label: Billing Reference
fields.description: Abrechnung reference number at bottom of document

fields.name: route_stops
fields.label: Route Stops
fields.description: Each row in the Ort/Ankunft Soll table; do not invent stops

item_fields.name: stop_number
item_fields.label: Stop #
item_fields.description: Sequence number in the route table (1, 2, …)

item_fields.name: location_name
item_fields.label: Location
item_fields.description: Depot or terminal name for this stop

item_fields.name: arrival_scheduled
item_fields.label: Arrival (scheduled)
item_fields.description: Ankunft Soll date and time as shown on the document
